Instructions for use:Unfold the stand and use it for dripping water from washed bottlesNote:For first use, wash the kit in clean water or disinfect with ozone or ultraviolet light. Keep out of reach of children.

It is used indoors and outdoors before bonding ceramic tiles, levelling floors, painting or bonding insulation boards. The transparent, solvent-free formulation is vapour permeable,  and leaves no colouring - the substrate is clear after drying.
